description_long: This upright piano features a classic wooden construction with a dark brown finish and a rectangular form. The front displays a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and the piano is accompanied by a tufted, cushioned bench with scalloped edges. Adjacent to the piano is a tall, ornate wooden cabinet with glass-paneled doors and brass handles, as well as several drawers and decorative trim. The entire set is placed on a striped black-and-white floor mat, adding a touch of elegance. The piano's back is plain, while the cabinet's rear is mostly flat with minimal detailing. No visible pedals or brand markings are present, and the piano lid appears to be fully closed.
description: A classic upright piano with a dark wood finish, accompanied by a tufted bench and an ornate wooden cabinet, all set on a striped floor mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the piano keyboard, tufted bench, and the detailed cabinet with glass doors and drawers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the piano and cabinet, as well as the bench's scalloped edges.
description_view_2: Rear view of the piano and cabinet, showing plain wooden backs with minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the cabinet's flat rear and the piano's side profile.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white and 36 black keys, no notable non-standard features.
